Appropriation Under National Defense Provisions as Appropriation Under This Section, , , provided that any appropriation for the purposes of title V of the National Defense Education Act of 1958, section 481 et seq. of this title, for any fiscal year ending after , was to be deemed to have been appropriated pursuant to this section.Pub.
